untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 'third day of consolidation' — requires bar-by-bar consolidation pattern detection not expressible with single indicator conditions; (2) 'congestion zone with past activity' — requires zone definition and historical price clustering analysis; (3) 'contraction/merging of moving averages' — requires MA convergence detection (distance between sma_20 and sma_200 narrowing) which cannot be expressed in the 3-field condition format; (4) 'breakout expected in second half of day' — requires intraday time-based logic not available in daily OHLC indicators.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided: Entry attempts to capture MAs near price and entry near pivot. However, the core pattern recognition (consolidation day counting, zone-based entry, MA convergence detection, and intraday timing) cannot be reliably expressed using only the allowed indicator set and 3-field condition structure. This signal requires custom pattern detection logic or indicator enhancement (e.g., ma_distance = abs(sma_20 - sma_200), consolidation_bars counter).
